title: bromus alopecuros subsp. alopecuros
intro: Bromus alopecuros subsp. alopecuros, also known as the false brome, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant effects. Its health benefits include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive problems and urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
